---
name: New playbook, adapter, or prompt
about: Propose a new core playbook, AI-tool adapter, or prompt template
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

**What are you proposing?**
- [ ] New core playbook (`core/*.md`)
- [ ] New adapter for an AI tool (`adapters/*.md`)
- [ ] New prompt template (`prompts/universal-ai-seo-prompts.md`)
- [ ] Other

**What task would it cover that today's skill doesn't handle well?**
Describe the gap. Concrete example queries help.

**Sketch the content (rough is fine):**
Headings, the routing line ("When to use this playbook"), and one concrete example. The skill's Output Contract must still apply to anything produced from it.

**Have you tested this skill against the gap to confirm it's a gap?**
Run the relevant prompt from `prompts/universal-ai-seo-prompts.md` against your case. Paste the output that fell short.
